articles.title: Dlaczego mimo dobrych chęci nie udaje nam się oszczędzać? To nie kwestia lenistwa ani słabej woli
articles.summary: Mimo szczerych deklaracji i najlepszych intencji wielu z nas nie potrafi konsekwentnie odkładać pieniędzy. Deklarujemy "od przyszłego miesiąca zaczynam oszczędzać", a mimo to nadwyżka na koncie pozostaje iluzją. Zwykle jednak nie wynika to z lenistwa, braku inteligencji ani słabej woli. articles.title: Dow futures drop, oil prices push higher as Iran war remains stuck in stalemate
articles.summary: U.S. stock-index futures fell and crude prices rose on Sunday, after the market’s rally stalled last week as oil prices rose sharply amid the impasse in the war with Iran.

articles.title: Family investors turn to old-economy businesses like dealerships and fisheries to avoid AI disruption
articles.summary: While car dealerships and fisheries are less eye-catching than high-flying AI startups, they offer stability and cash flow that's attractive to family offices.

articles.summary: Starbucks said the moves will help the coffee chain return to profitable growth.

articles.title: China will order 200 Boeing jets, Trump tells Fox News
articles.summary: President Donald Trump told Fox News that China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, according to a clip that aired Thursday.
